note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 MiMo v2.5 Pro（最高思考强度）一次生成；原始产出在浏览器标题、开屏「Generated by MiMo v2.5 Pro」字样与控制台日志中直接写出了模型名，会在 Arena 盲评中泄露身份，本页为去除这些身份字样后的版本（改 3 行），生成逻辑未改。游戏内容：Perlin 噪声地形、WASD + 鼠标第一人称操控、12 种方块类型（含水、黑曜石、水晶、金块等）、程序化材质纹理、四种神话建筑（水晶塔、石环阵、龙骨遗迹、天空遗迹），按 G 可依次传送至神话建筑，小地图显示玩家位置和地标。
note.en: Generated in one shot via Claude Code with MiMo v2.5 Pro (max thinking effort). The original one-shot output wrote the model name into the browser title, an on-screen "Generated by MiMo v2.5 Pro" caption, and a console log, which would reveal its identity in the blind Arena; this page strips those identity strings (3 lines changed) and leaves the generation logic untouched. Gameplay: Perlin noise terrain, WASD + mouse first-person controls, 12 block types (including water, obsidian, crystal, gold), procedural textures, and four mythic structures (Crystal Tower, Stone Circle, Dragon Skeleton, Sky Ruins). Press G to cycle-teleport between landmarks; minimap shows player position and landmarks.

note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 MiMo v2.5 Pro（最高思考强度）一次生成；原始产出在 SVG 末尾有一行「Generated by MiMo v2.5 Pro」水印文本，会在 Arena 盲评中泄露身份，本页已移除该文本，其余未改。场景包含渐变天空、太阳、云朵、海洋波浪、沙滩、棕榈树、海鸥、完整自行车细节（辐条、链条、齿轮、脚踏）以及鹈鹕（长喙、喉囊、羽翼、踩踏姿态），海滩上有海星和贝壳装饰。
note.en: Generated in one shot via Claude Code with MiMo v2.5 Pro (max thinking effort). The original output carried a "Generated by MiMo v2.5 Pro" watermark text at the bottom of the SVG, which would reveal its identity in the blind Arena; this page removes that text and nothing else. Scene includes gradient sky, sun, clouds, ocean waves, beach, palm trees, seagulls, detailed bicycle (spokes, chain, gears, pedals), and a pelican (beak, gular pouch, wings, pedaling pose), with starfish and shell decorations on the beach.
